nasb.text: For the sons of Judah have done that which is evil in My sight,” declares the Lord, “they have set their detestable things in the house which is called by My name, to defile it.

esv.text: “For the sons of Judah have done evil in my sight, declares the Lord. They have set their detestable things in the house that is called by my name, to defile it.

cnv.text: “因為猶大人行了我看為惡的事，把他們可憎的偶像安放在稱為我名下的殿中，污瀆了這殿。”這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“犹大人做了我视为邪恶的事，把可憎的偶像放在用来敬拜我的圣殿中，玷污了圣殿。
